text:
Rottfelli (ロットフェリ, Rottoferi) Rottfelli is most likely the surname of the character. is a Mafioso and a new client of Neon Nostrade. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 71 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

En route to her hotel in Yorknew City, Neon receives her September assignments and complains about them since there are more than usual. Dalzollene explains that Mr. Rottfelli and Mr. Trink wanted their fortunes told. He assures Neon that they are close friends of her father. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, the character's name is "Rotfelli-sama". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 41 (2011) 
In the 1999 anime adaptation (subtitled version), his name is first presented as "Mr. Rottfelli" Hunter × Hunter - Episode 51 (1999) and then as "Rotferri". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 52 (1999)
